arts.ttl: 'One of the best' - Club chief breaks silence on manager future amid Man Utd and Man City links
arts.sum: Manchester United and Manchester City are both claimed to be preparing for life beyond their current managers and one candidate has - reportedly - caught the eye in both boardrooms.

arts.ttl: Twente coach puts Lazio in same category as Manchester United and Fenerbahce
arts.sum: FC Twente coach Joseph Oosting has said that Thursday’s Europa League opponents, Lazio, are in...

arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies: Man Utd and Real Madrid told ASTRONOMICAL demands
arts.sum: Alphonso Davies: Man Utd and Real Madrid told ASTRONOMICAL demands Alphonso Davies is demanding a €15 million signing bonus in addition to his sizeable salary, according to German media.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Manchester City have now joined Manchester United and Arne Slot in race to sign special £83m talent
Mourinho, Fred and Amrabat – Could they haunt Ten Hag's Man Utd?
arts.sum: If football had playwrights, the Sukru Saracoglu Stadium would be the ideal theatre to stage the latest episode in the thickening plot surrounding Erik ten Hag's future at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Juventus have other options despite Zirkzee rumours with Manchester United
arts.sum: Reports online and in the UK over the last week have seen Juventus linked with...

arts.ttl: In-form Man Utd centre-back ruled out of Fenerbahce trip
arts.sum: Manchester United have left Jonny Evans out of their travelling squad Thursday night's UEFA Europa League clash with Fenerbahce. Knocks suffered by both Casemiro and Matthijs de Ligt in the Brentford win have not stopped the pair from training and travelling, with both looking likely to feature against Fenerbahce.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag faces making more unwanted Man United history with 41-year record at risk
arts.sum: Man United will be determined to get their first Europa League win of the season on the board against Fenerbahce.

arts.ttl: Edgar Davids reveals 'unbelievable' experience that almost led to Man Utd transfer
arts.sum: Edgar Davids found Ferguson "funny, charming and intelligent" when he spoke to him and says he was tempted to join Manchester United

arts.ttl: Gareth Southgate tipped for Premier League job after ruling out becoming Man Utd manager
arts.sum: Gareth Southgate recently vowed to take a year out from management after leaving his role as England boss in July, despite emerging as a target for Manchester United
